description_long: This house features a single-story layout with stone-textured exterior walls and large arched windows and doors on the front facade, giving it a Mediterranean or rustic appearance. The interior is divided into several rooms, each with distinct wall colors and visible furnishings such as tables, chairs, and wall art. The front of the house opens onto a green lawn area, while the rear and sides are more enclosed with fewer windows. The roof is flat, and the structure appears to be constructed primarily from stone or brick, with wooden and glass elements for doors and windows. The entryway is marked by a prominent wooden door and three large arched glass doors, providing ample natural light to the main living space. Decorative round windows and interior partitions add architectural interest and functionality.
description: A single-story stone house with large arched windows and doors, flat roof, and a green lawn entry. The interior is divided into multiple rooms with visible furnishings and decorative elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing stone-textured walls, two arched windows, and a wooden door leading to a green lawn area.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting three large arched glass doors, a stone facade, and the main entryway opening onto a green lawn.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with minimal windows, a wooden door, and interior room divisions visible through the open roof.
description_view_3: Rear view showing two round windows, the back of the arched glass doors, and interior partitions.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large arched windows and doors on the front, minimal windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a prominent wooden door and three large arched glass doors, opening directly onto a green lawn with no steps or porch.
